title: Optimicons
description: A mod pack aimed at improving vanilla minecraft with the help of client mods. RELEASE 1.21
body:
### Modpack
The modpack fixes some problems of vanilla minecraft (optimization, Hud of some blocks, etc.) and complements the vanilla minecraft itself.
> _You can see the list of mods in the versions section files;_
>
> **_Some modifications may be prohibited on some servers, before installing the build, check out the prohibited modifications on the server;_**
> 
> If minecraft crashes when you click the **Singleplayer** button, disable the Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric) mod
### Additionally and important!!!

- If you have any ideas what to add to the build, or you just want to help with it, contact me at discord!

- If you are a blogger/streamer or any other person involved in running YouTube/twitch channels, then please leave a link to the page of this mod pack and specify the author of this build in your video/stream.

- Anyone is prohibited from selling this Mod pack.

- It is forbidden to distribute with third parties.
